companies.name: Baumer Inspection GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Baumer Inspection GmbH. Baumer Inspection GmbH is a Machinery Manufacturing company. Baumer Inspection is a company that specializes in the production and distribution of furniture, flooring, and panel products. They have a global presence and are a reference partner for their products. They offer a wide range of services and support to their customers. Baumer Inspection GmbH employs 22 people (-8.9% YoY, -4 people). Headquartered in Konstanz, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, with presence in Italy and Switzerland.
[...]
For more than 35 years, Baumer Inspection is specialised in maximize precision for surface inspection and quality supervision. With more than 1.000 installed systems we are your global partner for automatic optical inspection systems for defect detection and process monitoring. Our scanners inspect worldwide furniture panels, decorative papers, foils, laminate flooring and surfaces and edges of furniture components.
[...]
Baumer Inspection is integrated in the Swiss Baumer Group, a world leader for high-quality sensors and systems for factory automation. With over 2,500 employees worldwide, and 250 employees dedicated to industrial image processing/image sensors, Baumer Inspection is one of the leading companies in the vision industry.
[...]
- Industry: Machinery Manufacturing
- Type: Public Company
- Headquarters: Konstanz, Germany
- Homepage: baumerinspection.com

companies.name: PARKVI GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
PARKVI GmbH. PARKVI GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. PARKVI GmbH is an industrial image processing integrator specializing in the development and installation of vision and ID systems. They also provide services such as vision and ID systems, maintenance and repair of existing system systems, and the purchase of image processing components. PARKVI GmbH employs 3 people (+300.0% YoY, +3 people), founded in 2019. Headquartered in Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany.
[...]
We, PARKVI GmbH and our team, offer you honest, manufacturer-independent image processing consultancy as well as high-quality complete systems for production, quality assurance, process control and measurement with cost-effective image processing solutions.
[...]
In addition to prefabricated complete systems, we are also available as a system house for the procurement of image processing components such as Smart Camera Vision, Complex PC System Vision, Vision Sensors, Industrial ID Reader, Lighting and Optics.
[...]
We have expert knowledge with systems such as Cognex, Matrox, Keyence, Opto-Engineering, Baumer and we can also offer them to you.
[...]
- Industry: Automation Machinery Manufacturing
- Type: Privately Held
- Headquarters: Augsburg, Germany
- Founded Year: 2019
- Homepage: parkvi.de
- Aliases: parkvi gmbh
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/parkvi-gmbh

companies.name: aku.automation GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
aku.automation GmbH. aku.automation GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. aku is a company that specializes in industrial image processing. They offer customized solutions to help businesses achieve efficiency and quality assurance. Aku.automation GmbH employs 19 people (-13.8% YoY, -4 people), founded in 2007. Headquartered in Aalen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, with presence in Indonesia.
[...]
With more than 40 highly qualified employees, aku.automation GmbH has developed from a local high-tech company into a global specialist in the field of industrial image processing. Many customers, such as u.a. Milka, VW, Bosch, Paulaner, Hochland, Daimler and Varta rely on us all over the world - and thus on maximum process reliability in their companies. Innovative competence and the courage to innovate are among the corporate DNA of aku.automation.
[...]
We always provide you the optimal components and systems as well as the best services. As a partner of the world's leading specialists, we have access to their components and resources, which directly benefits our customers. Furthermore we have high-quality in-house developments in our portfolio in the fields of optics, lighting and software.
[...]
- Industry: Automation Machinery Manufacturing
- Type: Public Company

companies.name: Vision On Line GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Vision On Line GmbH. Vision On Line GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Vision On Line is a company that develops machine vision and robotic solutions to optimize production and ensure quality. They offer system development and application solutions, including 3d bin-picking, 3d picking ki, sorting and checking, packaging, durability, electrical connections, and presshärten. They provide a range of technologies and partner services, including technology and technology. Vision On Line GmbH employs 5 people, founded in 2020. Headquartered in Langenselbold, Hesse, Germany.
[...]
Technologien der industriellen Bildverarbeitung und Robotik sind unsere Basis für die automatisierte Qualitätssicherung. 
Wir bieten langjährige Erfahrung, Marktübersicht und Applikations Know-how an und begleiten Ihre Vision Projekte bis zum 'go On Line' im 24/7/365 Betrieb.

We create Machine Vision & Robotics solutions.

Our mission is to provide a response to industrial production companies needs, for better, faster and more reliable inspection solutions.

Intelligent and digitally interconnected systems are the technical basis for this. With the growing help of Artificial Intelligence and Deep Learning, we today solve tasks, that seemed impossible yesterday.

companies.name: bci GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
bci GmbH. bci GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Bci GmbH employs 6 people (-40.0% YoY, -4 people), founded in 1993. Headquartered in Germany.
[...]
For more than 25 years, bci GmbH, headquartered in Isernhagen near Hanover, has been your specialist for industrial identification and image processing projects.
[...]
Established in 1993, the company specialized in barcode-based solutions for logistics and production at an early stage: Our customers from the automotive, electronics, food, medical and many other industries have access to needs-based Auto-ID and vision solutions as well as applications for the mobile and ticketing sector.
[...]
When supporting our customers, we rely on a holistic approach consisting of the components planning, development, implementation, service and accompanying consulting. 

As a partner of well-known manufacturers such as Datalogic, Keyence, Zebra Technologies or LMI Technologies, we have access to the latest technologies for industrial automation.
[...]
